description:
Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Key Features:
- Launch applications, files, folders, websites, web services (with parameters) and prompts in milliseconds.
- Trigger multiple actions with one text command and/or hotkey.
- Let's be an expert in opening up the world instead of trying to put the whole world inside of Executor (as some alternatives try to do).
- Take the clipboard to a new level, swiftly trigger system commands, do fast calculations, manage running applications and more.
- Tailor keywords, appearance, hotkeys, and behavior to perfectly match your daily workflow.
- Customize the look and feel with various skins and theming options to match your desktop setup.
Improvements
- Improved timing on keyword commands pasting text.
Fixes
- Fixed a problem that could occur under certain conditions with keywords assigned to a hotkey that use keyboard emulation commands.
Other notes
- Added some new keywords to the imports file extras.exc. Type imports to find these.
- ?forceshutdown - Fast full cold shutdown windows, no hybrid sleep
- ?coldrestart - Force restart windows cleanly with a full kernel reset
- ?coldrestartcontinue - Full cold restart windows and relaunch registered apps
- ?restartexplorer - Restart windows explorer process
- ?restartgraphics - Restart the graphics driver stack
- ?godmode - Open the master windows management directory
- ?blackout - Instantly disable all network adapters (ethernet + wifi)
- ?restorenet - Instantly enable all network adapters back online
- flushdns - Flush the local dns resolver cache
- gamemode - Open gaming mode panel
- actioncenter - Open windows action center
- connectdevice - Open the Connect quick actions
- present - Choose a presentation display mode
- about - Display the System Properties
